n_glance.speaker: Renn
n_glance.text: (Renn doesn't say anything at first — just watches you, the way you'd watch a door you might need later.)

n_word.speaker: Renn
n_word.text: Keep your head down in there. Copy everyone. Don't be interesting.

n_why.speaker: Renn
n_why.text: Because nobody told me. That's all.
